rsvp_marketing_hero_tagline: One-stop reservation system. Online booking, flexible pricing, payments, and reminders—all in one place.
rsvp_marketing_feature_booking_descripti: Online reservation with date and time picker, facility and optional service-staff selection. Set how far in advance customers can book and how far ahead.
rsvp_marketing_feature_pricing_descripti: Set default cost per facility. Add pricing rules by day (weekday/weekend) and time range so peak and off-peak rates apply automatically.
rsvp_marketing_feature_payment_descripti: Optional prepay (full or partial). Checkout with Stripe, LINE Pay, customer credit, or cash. Show or hide cost to customers.
rsvp_marketing_feature_notifications_des: Configurable reminder sent before the reservation. Confirmations and status updates keep everyone in sync.
rsvp_marketing_feature_calendar_descript: Week-view calendar for staff. Confirm, mark ready, no-show, or complete. Tags, blacklist, and waitlist supported.
rsvp_marketing_feature_integrations_desc: Reserve with Google and Google Maps. Sync with Google Calendar and Apple Calendar. LINE reservation flow.
rsvp_marketing_feature_policies_descript: Configurable cancel policy (free cancel before X hours). Store and per-facility business hours. Single-slot mode for personal-shop style.
waitlist_marketing_hero_tagline: No extra hardware. Customers scan a QR code, join the queue from their phone, and staff manage everything from the browser.
waitlist_marketing_hero_typewriter_2: QR from your phone—no extra hardware. Staff manage everything in the browser.
waitlist_marketing_feature_smarter_realt: Guests can cancel or keep their spot while you see updates instantly—fewer empty waits and less staff overhead.
waitlist_marketing_feature_line_integrat: Scan a QR code and join the waitlist in LINE. No download, no signup—zero friction.
waitlist_marketing_feature_flexible_queu: Skip the physical line, wait on your terms
Guests don’t need to queue at the door. They get flexible call-ahead alerts—ideal for restaurants, clinics, and smart queuing.
waitlist_marketing_feature_party_size_se: Party size options for better seating
Configurable party sizes (e.g. 2–8) help you plan tables—great alongside paging systems.
waitlist_marketing_feature_line_notify_c: LINE pushes turn reminders so guests never miss their number—smoother service and shorter perceived waits.
waitlist_marketing_feature_cloud_admin_s: Simple cloud back office, no extra hardware
Manage everything in the browser—no proprietary devices. Staff ramp fast and you can roll out waitlist plus ordering flows quickly.
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_2_title: Choose party size and join the online waitlist
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_3_title: Track your place in line; LINE notifies you when it’s your turn
waitlist_marketing_customer_step_4_title: Head in and enjoy your meal
waitlist_marketing_cta_heading: Turn on cloud waitlist for your store
